title: Angwyy's Armory
description: This is a datapack that adds a few new types of armor items to the game. They all have unique textures, functionality and recipes.
body:
Credits: [PuckiSilver's NoShadow](https://github.com/PuckiSilver/NoShadow) | [Ancientkingg's fancyPants](https://github.com/Ancientkingg/fancyPants)

This is a datapack that adds a couple new armor pieces with custom mechanics, recipes and textures.

Here are all the features:

Windy Boots | Double jump by sneaking midair, you have three double jumps | Recipe:




![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c419982b0bad83532a2c838ca0aa7645e0e78609.png)

Slime Boots | The longer you fall, the higher you can jump after | Negates all fall damage
| Recipe:




![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/867d81daf59d604c5d94bf995d1858396e68b1ea.png)

Ominous Hood | Quickly sneak and unsneak to dash | Recipe:




![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb518a646226ad707f5c3e6d6f7918f03007473c.png)

Rocket Boots | Sneaking will allow you to fly temporarily | Recipe:





![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38478dc4177bec9a1c9d98ead91a700041fb55c1.png)
